expectations.text: Recognizes semi-additive: take LAST date, not SUM over all days
expectations.evidence: 'summing ... over a multi-day period would double- (or N-times-) count'

expectations.text: Sums Units On Hand across products/stores at last date
expectations.evidence: SUM(Inventory[Units On Hand]) additive across Product/Store

expectations.text: Explains why a plain SUM over the period double-counts
expectations.evidence: detailed explanation of per-day double counting
